Home / Services / Deck & Patio Construction

Deck & Patio Construction

Extend your living space outdoors with our custom deck and patio construction services.

Enhance your outdoor living experience with our custom deck and patio construction services in Omaha. A well-designed deck or patio can transform your backyard into a relaxing oasis or an entertainment hub. We offer a wide range of options to suit your style and budget, from traditional wood decks to low-maintenance composite decks and elegant paver patios.

We handle all aspects of deck and patio construction, from design and planning to construction and finishing touches. We work closely with you to create an outdoor space that meets your specific needs and preferences. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure that your deck or patio is durable, safe, and beautiful. We handle permits and inspections, ensuring compliance with local codes and regulations.

Our team is experienced in building decks and patios that can withstand Omaha's weather conditions, including hot summers and cold winters. We understand the importance of proper drainage and structural integrity. We prioritize clear communication throughout the project, keeping you informed of progress and addressing any concerns promptly. Let us help you create an outdoor space where you can relax, entertain, and enjoy the beauty of nature.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Consultation and Design – We discuss your vision, budget, and needs to create a detailed design plan.
  2. 02 Step 2: Material Selection – Choose from a wide range of decking, patio pavers, and railing options.
  3. 03 Step 3: Construction and Installation – Our skilled team handles all aspects of construction and installation.
  4. 04 Step 4: Finishing Touches – We complete the project with staining, sealing, and final inspections.

Benefits

  • Increased Property Value
  • Enhanced Outdoor Living
  • Improved Entertainment Space
  • Custom Design

Frequently Asked Questions

What types of decking materials do you offer?

We offer a wide range of decking materials, including wood (cedar, redwood, pressure-treated lumber) and composite decking (Trex, TimberTech). We can help you choose the best material for your budget and style.

Do I need a permit to build a deck or patio?

In most cases, you will need a permit to build a deck or patio. We can assist you with the permit application process.

How do you ensure the durability of your decks and patios?

We ensure the durability of our decks and patios by using high-quality materials, proper construction techniques, and adhering to local building codes. We also offer warranties on our workmanship.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with deck & patio construction? Contact us today.
